sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الْمَدْرَسَةُ عَنْ رِحْلَةٍ إِلَى الْمَزْرَعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Škola je objavila izlet na farmu.
sentences.translationEn: The school announced a trip to the farm.

sentences.translation: Učenici su vidjeli različite životinje i biljke.
sentences.translationEn: The students saw various animals and plants.

sentences.arabic: جَرَّبَ الطُّلَّابُ حَلْبَ الْبَقَرَةِ وَقَطْفَ الثِّمَارِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su pokušali musti kravu i brati voće.
sentences.translationEn: The students tried milking the cow and picking fruit.

sentences.arabic: عَادَ الطُّلَّابُ وَهُمْ يَحْمِلُونَ خُضَرَاوَاتٍ طَازَجَةً.
sentences.translation: Učenici su se vratili noseći svježe povrće.
sentences.translationEn: The students returned carrying fresh vegetables.
